---
title: "Flowcluster: Cluster origin-destination flow data"
description: "Hussein Mahfouz and Robin Lovelace (2025). Flowcluster: Cluster origin-destination flow data. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.flowcluster"
date: "2025-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "mahfouz_flowcluster_2025"
citation-type: "book"
citation-type-label: "Book"
venue: ""
doi: "10.32614/CRAN.package.flowcluster"
publication-url: "https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=flowcluster"
authors:
  - "Hussein Mahfouz"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Book
**Year:** 2025

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.flowcluster) [Publisher Link](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=flowcluster) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Hussein Mahfouz and Robin Lovelace (2025). Flowcluster: Cluster origin-destination flow data. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.flowcluster

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@manual{mahfouz_flowcluster_2025,
  title = {flowcluster: Cluster origin-destination flow data},
  author = {Mahfouz, Hussein and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2025},
  doi = {10.32614/CRAN.package.flowcluster},
  url = {https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=flowcluster},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
